name: ColorHSL
summary: Represents an HSL (Hue, Saturation, Luminance) color with double precision floating point channels. HSL colors are used primarily in Graphical User Interface environments as they provide a very natural approach to picking colors.

constructors.name: ColorHSL(Color)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSL that is equivalent to an ARGB color.
constructors.remarks: Exact conversions between color spaces are often not possible.

constructors.name: ColorHSL(Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorHSL(double hue, double saturation, double luminance)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSL with custom channel values.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: saturation
params.doc: Saturation channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: luminance
params.doc: Luminance channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

constructors.name: ColorHSL(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorHSL(double alpha, double hue, double saturation, double luminance)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSL with custom channel values.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Alpha channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: saturation
params.doc: Saturation channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: luminance
params.doc: Luminance channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

methods.name: CreateFromCMYK
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSL equivalent of a CMYK color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the CMYK color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSV
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest HSL equivalent of an HSV color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the HSV color.

methods.name: CreateFromLAB
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSL equivalent of a LAB color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the LAB color.

methods.name: CreateFromLCH
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSL equivalent of a LCH color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the LCH color.

methods.name: CreateFromRGBA
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSL equivalent of a RGBA color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the RGBA color.

methods.name: CreateFromXYZ
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSL equivalent of an XYZ color.

returns.doc: The HSL equivalent of the XYZ color.

methods.name: ToArgbColor
methods.summary: Convert HSL color to an equivalent System.Drawing.Color.

methods.name: Implicit(ColorHSL to Color)
methods.signature: public static implicit operator Color (ColorHSL hsl)
methods.summary: Implicitly converts a ColorHSL in a .Net library color.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: Gets or sets the alpha channel value. Alpha channels are limited to a 0~1 range.

properties.name: H
properties.summary: Gets or sets the hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

properties.name: L
properties.summary: Gets or sets the luminance channel value. Luminance channels are limited to a 0~1 range.

properties.name: S
properties.summary: Gets or sets the saturation channel value. Saturation channels are limited to a 0~1 range.
